sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97189" key="streyau/xhn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στρεψαύχην</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ενος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n97189.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">neck-twisting</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0513.tlg001:54" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">54</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
